summary: Completed testing of duplicate email error handling fix. Backend is working correctly with proper 409 responses, but frontend has critical issues with error message display and user experience.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate email error shows generic 'Registration failed. Please try again.' instead of user-friendly message
ui_bugs.expected: Should show 'This email is already registered. Please log in instead.' under email field
ui_bugs.actual: Shows generic error under confirm password field

ui_bugs.issue: Missing 'Go to Login' link in duplicate email error message
ui_bugs.expected: Error message should include clickable 'Go to Login' link
ui_bugs.actual: No login link present in error message

ui_bugs.issue: Toast notification shows generic 'Registration failed' instead of 'Email already registered'
ui_bugs.expected: Should show 'Email already registered' with description 'This email is already in use. Try logging in instead.'

integration_issues.issue: AuthContext.js EMAIL_EXISTS error code not being properly detected in RegisterPage.jsx
integration_issues.root_cause: Error handling logic in RegisterPage.jsx catch block not properly detecting error.code === 'EMAIL_EXISTS'

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register with new email returns 200 with user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with duplicate email returns HTTP 409 with correct message
Backend: Login with existing user works correctly
Frontend: Normal registration flow works for new email
Frontend: No technical 'body stream already read' errors visible
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (3/3 tests passed), Frontend: 33% (2/6 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend error handling in RegisterPage.jsx: 1) Ensure error.code === 'EMAIL_EXISTS' condition is properly triggered, 2) Display specific error message under email field with 'Go to Login' link, 3) Show correct toast notification for duplicate email
